title: The man who is both hard and gentle
caption:
Most men are soft on their own sin and hard on everyone else's.

That's the wrong ratio.

The man God is building flips it — ruthless about what he lets himself become, generous with the people he's called to serve. Jesus was both. So are the men He's forming.

#godlymanhood #christianmen #strength #gentleness #faithandcharacter #ethos
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
